title: #Alive
tmdbOverview: As a grisly virus rampages a city, a lone man stays locked inside his apartment, digitally cut off from seeking help and desperate to find a way out.
synopsis: #Alive is a 2020 action, horror and science fiction film from South Korea. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
